# BoldlyBalance Lifestyle

> Contrarian lifestyle editorial covering sleep, fitness, mind, wellness, finance, and travel. 42 long-form articles.

## Machine-readable index

- Full post index (JSON): https://lifestyle.boldlybalance.life/posts.json
- Full content API (per-post JSON with body): https://lifestyle.boldlybalance.life/api/posts/<slug>.json
- API index: https://lifestyle.boldlybalance.life/api/
- RSS feed: https://lifestyle.boldlybalance.life/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://lifestyle.boldlybalance.life/sitemap.xml
